description: Four-step workflow: material production, mechanical characterization, constitutive model calibration, and FEM material card export. Demonstrates cross-domain workflow composition using manufacturing, characterization, and simulation schemas.

steps.label: Material Production, 316L batch 1
steps.description: Melting, casting, and rolling of austenitic stainless steel 316L. Batch 1 test coupons cut for QA and material card purposes.

steps.label: Tensile Test, 316L batch 1 QA
steps.description: Room-temperature tensile test according to ISO 6892-1 on two specimens from batch 1. Yields Rp0.2, Rm, and A50.

steps.label: Hockett-Sherby Calibration, 316L batch 1
steps.description: Fit Hockett-Sherby constitutive model to flow curve extracted from the tensile test. Produces sigma_sat, sigma_0, c, n.

steps.label: FEM Material Card Export, LS-Dyna and Abaqus
steps.description: Query the knowledge graph for the calibrated Hockett-Sherby parameters and export a syntactic material card in LS-Dyna *MAT_036 and Abaqus *PLASTIC formats for downstream FEM analyses.
